summary: Completed testing of Training Certificate Evidence System. Backend: 13/13 tests pass after fixing get_object tuple unpacking bug. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly - Upload Certificate dialog, View/Download buttons, Verify/Unverify buttons, 'No certificate uploaded' warnings.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/employees/{id}/training/{requirement_id}/upload-certificate - uploads certificate and marks training complete
Backend: POST /api/employees/{id}/training/{requirement_id}/upload-certificate - fails for invalid requirement_id
Backend: POST /api/employees/{id}/training/{requirement_id}/upload-certificate - fails for non-training requirement
Backend: POST /api/employees/{id}/training/{requirement_id}/upload-certificate - fails for invalid employee_id
Backend: POST /api/training-records/{id}/verify - works when certificate exists
Backend: POST /api/training-records/{id}/verify - fails when no certificate (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/training-records/{id}/unverify - removes verification from training
Backend: GET /api/training-records/{id}/certificate/file - returns certificate file for viewing
Backend: GET /api/training-records/{id}/certificate/download - downloads certificate with attachment header
Backend: GET /api/training-records/{id}/certificate/file - returns 404 when no certificate
Backend: GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-requirements - includes certificate_url, has_evidence, verified for training
Backend: Safeguarding training has certificate and verification fields
Backend: Training without certificate has has_evidence=False
Frontend: Login and navigation works
Frontend: Employee profile loads with compliance data
Frontend: Checklist tab shows training requirements
Frontend: 'Upload Certificate' buttons appear for training without certificates (4 buttons)
Frontend: 'View', 'Download', 'Verify', 'Replace' buttons appear when certificate exists (2 each)
Frontend: 'No certificate uploaded' warning appears for training without certificates (4 warnings)
Frontend: Upload Certificate dialog opens with training name, file input, expiry date
Frontend: View button opens document preview modal
Frontend: Verify button works - shows 'Training verified successfully' toast
Frontend: Unverify button works - shows 'Training verification removed' toast
Frontend: Download button triggers file download

bugs_fixed.issue: get_training_certificate_file and download_training_certificate endpoints were not unpacking the tuple returned by get_object()
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'file_bytes = get_object(...)' to 'file_bytes, stored_content_type = get_object(...)' to properly unpack the (content, content_type) tuple

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed get_object tuple unpacking in certificate view/download endpoints)
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee Olakunle Alonge (id: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77). Safeguarding and Manual Handling training have certificates uploaded. Infection Control, BLS, Fire Safety, Health & Safety are completed without certificates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training certificate evidence system fully implemented and tested. All endpoints work correctly: upload-certificate, verify, unverify, view, download. Frontend UI shows correct buttons based on certificate status. Training without certificates shows warning and 'Upload Certificate' button. Training with certificates shows View, Download, Verify/Unverify, Replace buttons. Verification requires certificate to be uploaded first (enforced by backend).
